deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back in to make updates and repairs before relisting. Underwater by 93K-143K. Double-carrying costs. Short sale path recommended but sellers chose to hold and improve.

logs.m: Listing terminated - sellers moving back in to renovate
Called with three paths - short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close. Chandler laid off but leaning toward short sale.
Market analysis sent - 350K-400K realistic value vs 493K payoff

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: Divorce situation - sellers need to sell to divide assets. 3BR/2BA on 4.05 acres. Payoff approximately 257K. Recommend list price 295K. Thin market - only 3 comps in 10-mile radius.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender before listing. Schedule professional photos. Get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property - pulled CMA, confirmed payoff ~257K, built net sheet

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Listed May 14 at 259,900. Referral from Isaac Linares. Sellers relocating to NC second week of June - high urgency. Multiple showings - second-look buyers are hottest lead. Insurance adjuster completed roof inspection May 11.
deals.next: Confirm showings. Follow up with second-look buyers agent. Monitor for backup offers.

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back - their favorite. Pre-inspection report offered.
Investor cash offer at 176,300 discussed - kept conversation open
MLS live - first showing 9:15am with showing feedback received

deals.title: Tilden 20 Acres
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. Contract at 113K with Espinoza buyers. Buyer agent is Javier. EMD not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment sent for third party financing. Steve signed new T-47 via DocuSign.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain.

logs.m: Steve called back - completed new T-47 via DocuSign - waiting notary confirmation
Espinoza buyers accepted at 113K. Amendment sent to Javier.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected. Flooring starting this week. Drywall complete, paint finishing up. Water meter pending install. Cameras installed on property. Contractor: HouzzPro/Matt Toney managing renovation.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric to confirm meter install. Call EMCSUD for water service setup. Submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.

logs.m: Visited property - installed 3 cameras. Flooring starts this week. Water meter 1-2 days away.
Drywall patching complete. Paint finishing. Sent photo updates to Kelly.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale - cash transaction at 152,000. Closed and funded April 27 2026. Lien blocker resolved through mobile notary signature on April 21. Military buyer via Sam VanDenheuvel.
deals.next: Confirm commission received. Deliver gift basket to Joyce. Thank you to title company and notary.

logs.m: Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo at mobile notary - delivered to Chicago Title

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Buyer lead from LRH pop-up. Rental property being sold by landlord. Pivoting to new construction with rate buydowns and incentives. Previously explored 301 W Saxet Corpus Christi FHA 203k deal but backed out - too much work. Pre-approval with Zach Schaphorst approximately 122K.
leads.next: Follow up on new construction search platform engagement. Confirm Zach pre-approval status. Identify builder options.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal - still actively searching

leads.title: Bryce & Wife
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 Priority Bank property. Bryce is dumpster contractor. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area. Zero down VA loan opportunity.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info when on-site at 181 CR. Get wife VA eligibility details. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met on-site at Priority Bank property - wife active military

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon Morans mother. Interested in new construction home - likely Grace Gardens or similar Lennar community. Strategy: rent for 2 years then owner-occupy. Budget 50K down targeting approximately 1000/month payment. Builder rate buydowns are key to affordability.
leads.next: Get buyer rep signed. Confirm builder preferences. Register Chris as buyer agent before first builder visit. Pull new construction options across DR Horton MI Homes Lennar.

logs.m: Buyer rep sent - not yet signed. Builder outreach template drafted.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F
leads.detail: Community connection through Little Red House garden group. Grief healing through plants story. Potential content collaboration with permission. Long-term relationship building opportunity.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share healing story for social content. Keep nurturing relationship.

leads.title: Jahsia
leads.detail: Age 18 - finishing senior year. Interested in real estate career. Referred by Julie (veteran buyer). Prospect for eXp licensing and training discussion.
leads.next: Get contact info from Julie. Reach out with intro call about licensing path. Share eXp agent opportunity.

logs.m: Sent check-in text about Skool website

priorities.title: 181 CR 7751 Priority Bank Renovation
priorities.sub: Complete cleanup and get to market
priorities.notes: REO cleanup nearly complete. Flooring this week. Electric done. Water meter pending. Need utilities finalized and listing agreement submitted to bank.

followUps.text: Call Medina Electric - confirm meter install status
Call EMCSUD - confirm water service setup
Submit listing agreement to Ray Stidham at Priority Bank

priorities.title: 10023 Mill Path San Antonio
priorities.notes: Second-look buyers returned - it is their favorite. Need to move quickly on this lead while interest is high. Rescheduled showing May 30.

followUps.text: Follow up with agent after showing - momentum check
Prepare to handle offer if they decide to move forward

priorities.sub: Get Colton and Abby Brown to market
priorities.notes: Divorce situation - need payoff confirmation and listing agreement signed. CMA complete at 295K recommended. Payoff approximately 257K confirmed.

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender

priorities.notes: Brandon Morans mother - strong commission opportunity. Budget 50K down / 1000/month target. Must register Chris as buyer agent BEFORE first builder visit. Multiple builder options to present.
